title: Garlicky Chewy Kenyan Garlic Stir-fry
description: A gluten-free and date-night-friendly dish featuring chewy dates, blanched vegetables, garlic, English mustard, and a hint of spice for an authentic Kenyan flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., carrots, bell peppers)
1 can chickpeas (drained and rinsed)
ingredients.notes: Use canned or dried roasted chickpeas for a gluten-free option.

ingredients.name: 4 cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Add to taste for a flavorful kick.

instructions: Mix together olive oil, English mustard, salt, and minced garlic in a bowl. Set aside.
Drizzle this mixture over cooked quinoa and mix well until coated evenly.
Add mixed vegetables and chickpeas to the quinoa, tossing gently to combine all ingredients.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F. Afterward, reduce heat to 275°F and continue baking until the vegetables are slightly crispy, around another 15-20 minutes.
Remove from oven and add chopped dates on top. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot with fresh cilantro as a garnish if desired.
